game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **黄金矿工-可存档，复活，双人模式，联机对战:** Players control a miner whose claw swings continuously left and right; tapping the screen drops the claw to grab items. The claw retracts, pulling up gold nuggets, rocks, diamonds, or mystery bags, with heavier items like large gold nuggets ($500) taking longer to retrieve than lighter diamonds ($600). Each level presents a 60-second time limit to collect a specific monetary goal, starting at $500 for level 1 and increasing by $100 per level, with failure to meet the goal resulting in a loss. After successfully completing a level, players can spend earned money in a shop on single-use power-ups like dynamite to destroy unwanted items or strength potions to increase claw retraction speed by 25% for the next round. Progression involves clearing 10 unique levels, with diamonds appearing from level 2, before entering a cycle of increasingly difficult layouts, and a two-player local mode or online competitive mode allows players to race for the highest score within a shared time limit.
game_info.description: You are a gold miner on a quest to collect treasure! Your claw swings continuously—press SPACE to drop it and grab gold nuggets, diamonds, rocks, and mystery bags. Heavier items take longer to retrieve. Each level has a 60-second timer and a money goal that increases with each stage. Meet the target to advance, or it's game over! Between levels, visit the shop to buy power-ups like dynamite and strength potions. Complete 10 unique levels and keep climbing through increasingly challenging layouts!
game_info.controls:
SPACE: Drop/release the claw to grab items
Z: Use dynamite (if purchased, destroys grabbed item)
Arrow Keys: Navigate shop menu (up/down to select, right to buy)
ENTER: Start game / Confirm shop purchase
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: This test validates basic game mechanics including claw swinging, dropping, grabbing items, and level progression. It tests that the player can successfully interact with the game world and that collision detection works properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test drops the claw at semi-random intervals when it's in the idle swinging state. It aims for any visible items in the level and validates that items are successfully grabbed and retrieved. The test continues through multiple levels to ensure progression works.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test should successfully grab various items, increase the player's money, and progress through at least one level. The game state should update correctly, collision detection should work, and no errors should occur during gameplay.

TEST_2.test_description: This test implements an optimal winning strategy to complete the game by efficiently targeting high-value items. It validates that the win condition can be achieved and that the game progresses correctly through all levels.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The test analyzes the current level layout and prioritizes diamonds (highest value-to-time ratio) and gold nuggets while avoiding rocks. It calculates optimal claw angles to maximize revenue and uses power-ups strategically. The test buys strength potions in the shop to speed up retrieval times.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test should successfully complete multiple levels by meeting money goals within time limits. It should reach the GAME_OVER_WIN state after completing levels efficiently. Money should accumulate, and the test should demonstrate optimal play patterns.
